top_stories.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
top_stories.insight: This matters because it shows the confidence of major banks in their financial stability and ability to return value to shareholders.

top_stories.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
top_stories.insight: This matters because it highlights the Fed's efforts to ensure the stability of the US banking system and its ability to withstand potential losses.

top_stories.insight: This matters because gold prices can be an indicator of market sentiment and interest rate expectations.

top_stories.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Fall But Direction for Long-End Yields Still Seen Upward

daily_summary: The financial markets are experiencing significant developments, including major banks unveiling buybacks and dividend increases, the Fed's stress test results, and fluctuations in gold prices and US Treasury yields. The impact of AI-related news on the stock market is also a key theme.
